name: MAnchors: Memorization-Based Acceleration of Anchors via Rule Reuse and Transformation
summary: arXiv:2502.11068v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Anchors is a popular local model-agnostic explanation technique whose applicability is limited by its computational inefficiency. To addres...
description: arXiv:2502.11068v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Anchors is a popular local model-agnostic explanation technique whose applicability is limited by its computational inefficiency. To address this limitation, we propose a memorization-based framework that accelerates Anchors while preserving explanation fidelity and interpretability. Our approach leverages the iterative nature of Anchors...
author: Haonan Yu, Junhao Liu, Xin Zhang
